title: Error: ABC execution of command "(...)/yosys-abc -s -f  (...)/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code -1
body:
## Background

I am working with the [OpenROAD-flow](https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow) toolchain, and am trying to get [designs](https://github.com/mit-ll/CEP/tree/master/hdl_cores) from MIT LL Common Evaluation platform (CEP) to go through it. The toolchain use yosys for synthesis and makes use of the ABC tool.  I have been able to get the example designs and other designs from the CEP to go through the toolchain. With one [design](https://github.com/mit-ll/CEP/tree/master/hdl_cores/gps) in particular I am getting an esoteric error and the tools really don’t tell me what is going wrong. I am getting the same error as another [issue](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/issues/1028) that was closed on account of the poster not giving enough information.

## Steps to reproduce the issue
Get the [gps](https://github.com/mit-ll/CEP/tree/master/hdl_cores/gps) design files from the CEP github (It also uses modules from the [AES](https://github.com/mit-ll/CEP/tree/master/hdl_cores/aes) directory as well) and try to synthesize them using the synthesis script [synth.tcl.](https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow/blob/master/flow/scripts/synth.tcl)

## Expected behavior

Nonzero error code is returned.

## Actual behavior

Error code of -1 is returned.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/67165991/85618435-ccdce180-b62e-11ea-8914-260912e36c0f.png)

If I run this exact command that failed in terminal then it will run fine.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/67165991/85625072-dbc89180-b638-11ea-894b-d8014121b5b1.png)

## Personal trouble shooting

I spent a while trying to figure out what was going wrong with this design and found some very interesting things. If I comment out a specific module in the design then this error does not happen. Also, I know specifically which line in the synth.tcl script the error is occurring from. It is occurring from the synth command on line 55 of the [script](https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow/blob/master/flow/scripts/synth.tcl). If I add the -noabc flag to this line then the error no longer occurs.

The S4 module that is causing this error does not occur when the S4 module is moved up the hierarchy as well.

The modules that are highlighted are the problem area. The problem is not with the design itself as I was able to get it to synthesize fine in Vivado.

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/67165991/85618356-ab7bf580-b62e-11ea-87ab-23f5cc4ca9e6.png)


Any input is highly appreciated, and if there is any information that I need to add please let me know.
